description: wechat-cc dependency tracking. Strategy: aggressive auto-merge for LLM SDK patches (Codex / Claude / Gemini move fast and we want the latest protocols), human review for majors. See docs/maintenance.md for rationale.

packageRules.description: LLM SDK ecosystem — patch + minor auto-merge. Codex moves multiple times per week; staying close to upstream matters. Codex's SDK<->CLI protocol lock means we MUST keep these two in sync, so they share a group.
Codex major bumps — needs human review (API breaks more likely).
Claude Agent SDK — patch auto-merge; minor + major to human review. Currently pinned to 0.2.x; a 0.3 jump landed upstream (May 2026) but has potential API changes worth manual validation.
Claude Agent SDK minor + major — review.
Gemini SDK family — patch + minor auto-merge once we adopt it. @google/genai is HTTPS-based (no version-lock pain), so we can stay aggressive.
MCP SDK — patch auto-merge; minor + major human review.
Tauri + Tauri plugins — patch auto-merge; the desktop bundle build CI catches regressions.
Cargo (Rust) deps in apps/desktop/src-tauri — patches auto-merge.
Pin GitHub Actions to commit SHAs (security best practice — prevents tag-republishing supply-chain attacks).
